btcMarketContext.note: Approximate from AetherBot trading range this week

openIssues.title: POS WARNING — Phantom Position Investigation (v254)
openIssues.detail: Apr 16: 'POS WARNING | API 0 local 2' and 'API 0 local 15'. Bot tries to exit positions the exchange says don't exist. Three hypotheses: (a) BUY never filled (phantom), (b) exchange already settled at expiry (stale state), (c) API poll lag. v254 must log: full API response, BUY fill confirmation, seconds_left at warning. If (a) confirmed, this is a P0 rebuild — bot entering losses on phantom positions.

openIssues.title: BDI=0 Hold Time Gate — <120s Expiry Losses
openIssues.detail: 4 confirmed cases across Apr 13-16 where BDI=0 hold fired with <120s remaining. 3 of 4 expired worthless. Apr 13: -$12.96 (18c), Apr 14: -$1.60 (4c), Apr 15: -$4.83 (7c), Apr 16: -$9.60 (15c). Total: -$28.99 from mechanism failure. Fix: BDI=0 hold should NOT fire when seconds_left <= 120. No recovery possible at <120s.

openIssues.title: Harvest Miss Dual-Mode Fix
openIssues.detail: Two distinct failure modes confirmed. Mode A: Low anchor_depth (thin book at ±0.02). Mode B: High BDI (805+), deep book (817 contracts), yet yes_bids:ABSENT — stale orderbook race condition between poll and order placement. Mode A fix: anchor ±0.02 depth filter. Mode B fix: place harvest at CURRENT best bid at submission time, not polled anchor. v254 must instrument both modes separately.

openIssues.title: PAQ_STRUCT_GATE Watch — 3W/6L (33% WR), -$7.84 net
openIssues.detail: 4-day degradation from baseline 62% WR. But: (1) Apr 16 -$9.60 is BDI=0 hold mechanism failure not strategy failure (remove from eval), (2) Remaining losses need BTC regime cross-check — was BTC in false coil? (3) Apr 14 +$8.43 proves logic is sound in correct regime. Kill threshold NOT met: requires 5+ sessions with no positive-EV environment + Hyo approval. DO NOT gate further without BTC regime data.

openIssues.title: EVENING bps_premium Regime Sensitivity
openIssues.detail: Apr 13 EVENING bps_premium: +$5.94. Apr 16 EVENING bps_premium: -$14.82 (4 losses 19:45-21:15). BTC moved directionally against all positions. Not a strategy failure — regime-driven. Track BTC spot direction at entry vs settlement for EVENING trades. If pattern repeats 3+ sessions, research multi-candle BTC direction filter. DO NOT gate based on one session.

openIssues.title: EU_MORNING Post-04:15 Loss Clustering
openIssues.detail: 3 sessions of data show losses cluster in trades opened after 04:15 MTN. Pre-04:15 trades are net positive across sessions. Post-04:15 trades are net negative. Need 2-3 more sessions to confirm pattern. Next trigger: pattern holds in 2+ more sessions → session gate decision. Do NOT gate on current data.

openIssues.title: Weekend Risk Profile — Reduced Exposure
openIssues.detail: Target: $5 flat max, PAQ_MIN=4, disable confirm_late/confirm_standard Sat/Sun. Not built. Pending 2-3 more clean weekend sessions. Do not build without Hyo approval and sufficient session data.

operationalNotes.v254Scope: Harvest order-path instrumentation, BDI=0 time gate (skip when secs_left<=120), POS WARNING logging
operationalNotes.v254Status: HOLD — awaiting end-of-week data + Hyo approval. Do not build early.
